name: noctyrium-cloud
description: Optional Vercel serverless backend for Noctyrium cloud sync and AI scaffolding.

scripts.typecheck:api: tsc --noEmit --target ES2022 --module ESNext --moduleResolution Bundler --strict --skipLibCheck --types node api/_lib/*.ts api/health.ts api/user/login.ts "api/user/[id].ts" "api/data/[userId].ts" "api/data/[userId]/backup.ts" "api/data/[userId]/backups.ts" "api/data/[userId]/restore/[backupId].ts" api/progress/save.ts api/progress/load.ts api/ai/*.ts
